display_text: Cost: 1625: Drum of Endurance provides an aura granting +15 movement speed to nearby allies. Its active ability, Endurance, gives +35 attack speed and +13% movement speed to allies within 1200 range for 6 seconds, with a 45-second cooldown. An essential team-fighting and pushing utility item that provides 8 charges. Stats: CD: 45s, Duration: 6s, Radius: 1200, Charges: 8.

display_text: Cost: 1625: Synergy build for heroes that excel in early team fights and want to accelerate their team's tempo. Excellent on aura-based supports, initiators, and heroes who want to group early for tower pushes.
